"Let us begin by defining the total count of items on the slate.

midnight brings a fresh perspective to this mathematical puzzle.

We know that five largest values form a specific fraction of the whole sum.

Similarly, the five smallest entries make up another distinct portion of the total.

Adding these two groups together yields a combined ratio for ten specific numbers.

This sum represents more than half of all values present on the board.

The remaining numbers must fill the gap between the known parts and the total.

Calculating the difference reveals the exact count of the middle group.

Thus, the final answer is twenty numbers written in total."
